name: custom-router
description: Self-hostable, OpenAI-compatible LLM routing proxy with BYOK, explainability, and Cloudflare deployment support.

scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:ingest && npm run deploy:web
scripts.dev:seed: npm run db:seed && npm run dev -w @custom-router/web
scripts.local:stable: pkill -f "next dev" || true; pkill -f "next start" || true; rm -rf apps/web/.next; npm run db:seed; npm run build -w @custom-router/web; REGISTRATION_MODE=open PORT=${PORT:-3010} npm run start -w @custom-router/web
scripts.db:seed: rm -rf apps/web/.wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npx wrangler d1 execute custom-router-test --local --file=infra/d1/schema.sql --config apps/web/wrangler.toml
